summary: Backend: 14/14 pytest cases passed for Éclosion API (opportunities, training modules, auth protection, groups, funding). Frontend: welcome screen renders correctly with required testIDs and French branding. End-to-end Google Auth flow not automatable - skipped as instructed.

issues: Hero background image (Unsplash photo-1741940365831...) did not appear to render in web preview during test; only the dark gradient fallback was visible. May be a Unsplash CDN/expo-image web issue. Brand 'ÉCLOSION' is rendered (uppercased via textTransform), title 'Ensemble, bâtissons l'avenir', subtitle, 'Continuer avec Google' CTA, and legal text all present and well-positioned.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' - minor RN web deprecation warning, not blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Investigate why the welcome hero image does not load in the web preview; consider preloading or substituting with a Pexels image already used elsewhere.
(Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow to silence RN-web warnings.
Expo SDK package mismatch warnings in expo logs (expo@54.0.34 vs ~54.0.35, expo-font, expo-router) - not blocking but worth aligning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 500-line file - fine for MVP but consider splitting routers (auth/groups/training/funding) when scope grows.
All Mongo queries already exclude _id via projection {'_id': 0} - good.
get_current_user correctly returns 401 for missing/invalid/expired sessions; session TTL index set on expires_at.
auth/session endpoint relies on the session_token returned by Emergent Auth being stored as the bearer token - matches Emergent playbook pattern.
No rate limiting on /api/funding/generate which calls Claude via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - could be abused once auth works; consider per-user throttling later.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (welcome screen only - auth-gated flows skipped as instructed)

seed_data_creation: None. Used static seed opportunities/training modules from server.py and a single invalid token to exercise 401 path.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend route prefix is /api. Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (https://rural-womens-hub.preview.emergentagent.com). Auth uses Emergent Google flow - cannot be automated; to test authenticated endpoints, insert a fake user + user_session document directly into Mongo (collections: users, user_sessions) and call APIs with 'Authorization: Bearer <session_token>'.
